title: PowerPC PDF page-level text index
why_useful: Makes ABI, ISA, and compiler-guide lookup searchable by page for register, stack, calling convention, branch, conversion, and instruction questions.
use_caution: Generated text should remain a local search artifact; cite or inspect the source PDF/page as the authority.

title: Dolphin Training Mode GTME01 map
why_useful: Adds debugger-friendly address-to-name hints and section layout lookup.
use_caution: Training Mode and mod labels are hints, not canonical repo names; validate against local symbols and code.

title: Tockdom compiler calling-convention page
why_useful: Short calling-convention and compiler-behavior reference that can speed first-pass PPC interpretation.
use_caution: Likely incomplete and not Melee-specific; prefer the local ABI PDF for final rules.

title: m-ex MexTK include snapshot
why_useful: Header paths, type names, defines, and field terms can suggest names to search in local code and assembly.
use_caution: Do not copy structs or fields blindly; verify every layout decision by local decompilation evidence.

title: ppc2cpp mips_to_c branch
why_useful: Historical PPC mips_to_c branch referenced by old notes; useful for archaeology and old scratch comparison.
use_caution: Superseded by tools/decomp.py and current m2c for normal work.

title: Ghidra setup notes
why_useful: A repeatable setup note would help agents compare m2c output against a local disassembler/decompiler view.
use_caution: Decompiler output is draft evidence only; do not mirror installers.
refresh_command: Write the note after a verified local setup.

title: IDA Free setup notes
why_useful: A repeatable setup note would help contributors who prefer IDA for cross-checking control flow and data references.
use_caution: License-bound tool; decompiler output is draft evidence only; do not mirror installers.
refresh_command: Write the note after a verified local setup.

title: Dolphin debugger workflow notes
why_useful: A local debugger workflow note would make breakpoints, register inspection, memory watches, and MAP loading repeatable.
use_caution: Use debugger observations as leads; confirm names and semantics in local source/asm.
refresh_command: Write a short local workflow note once MAP loading and watch setup are confirmed.
